ddls:
CREATE TABLE "membership_data" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "membership_count" INTEGER /* Total number of memberships */,
  "wards" INTEGER /* Number of wards established */,
  "branches" INTEGER /* Number of branches established */,
  "units" INTEGER /* Number of units present */,
  "population" REAL /* Total population in millions */,
  "stakes" INTEGER /* Number of stakes established */,
  "districts" INTEGER /* Number of districts covered */,
  "missions" INTEGER /* Number of missions active */,
  "temples" INTEGER /* Number of temples established */,
  "population_wpp" INTEGER /* Total population according to World Population Prospects (WPP) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the country */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the state */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the city */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of membership */,
  "new_members" INTEGER /* Number of new members added in the year */,
  "active_members" INTEGER /* Number of active members */,
  "inactive_members" INTEGER /* Number of inactive members */,
  "baptisms" INTEGER /* Number of baptisms performed in the year */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions in the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "wards" (
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ward */,
  "ward_name" TEXT /* Name of the ward */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the ward */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the ward was established */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the country */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the state */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the city */,
  "active_members" INTEGER /* Number of active members in the ward */,
  "inactive_members" INTEGER /* Number of inactive members in the ward */,
  "baptisms" INTEGER /* Number of baptisms performed in the ward */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions in the ward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the branch */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the branch was established */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the country */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the state */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the city */,
  "active_members" INTEGER /* Number of active members in the branch */,
  "inactive_members" INTEGER /* Number of inactive members in the branch */,
  "baptisms" INTEGER /* Number of baptisms performed in the branch */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions in the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch the unit belongs to */,
  "year_established" INTEGER /* Year the unit was established */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the country */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the state */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the city */,
  "active_members" INTEGER /* Number of active members in the unit */,
  "inactive_members" INTEGER /* Number of inactive members in the unit */,
  "baptisms" INTEGER /* Number of baptisms performed in the unit */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions in the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic data collected */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the membership */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of the members */,
  "gender_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of males to females in the membership */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the country */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the state */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the city */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of members by age groups */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of members by ethnicity */,
  "education_level_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of members by education level */,
  "income_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of members by income level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stakes" (
  "stake_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stake */,
  "stake_name" TEXT /* Name of the stake */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stake */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the stake was established */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the country */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the state */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the city */,
  "active_members" INTEGER /* Number of active members in the stake */,
  "inactive_members" INTEGER /* Number of inactive members in the stake */,
  "baptisms" INTEGER /* Number of baptisms performed in the stake */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions in the stake */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stake_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the district */,
  "year_established" INTEGER /* Year the district was established */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the country */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the state */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the city */,
  "active_members" INTEGER /* Number of active members in the district */,
  "inactive_members" INTEGER /* Number of inactive members in the district */,
  "baptisms" INTEGER /* Number of baptisms performed in the district */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "mission_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the mission */,
  "year_established" INTEGER /* Year the mission was established */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the country */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the state */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the city */,
  "active_members" INTEGER /* Number of active members in the mission */,
  "inactive_members" INTEGER /* Number of inactive members in the mission */,
  "baptisms" INTEGER /* Number of baptisms performed in the mission */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions in the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temples" (
  "temple_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temple */,
  "temple_name" TEXT /* Name of the temple */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the temple */,
  "year_established" INTEGER /* Year the temple was established */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the country */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the state */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the city */,
  "visits_per_year" INTEGER /* Number of visits to the temple per year */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Activity level of the temple */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temple_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, member, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the country */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the state */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the city */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
